models.name: sglang
models.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.

models.name: NeMo
models.description: A scalable generative AI framework built for researchers and developers working on Large Language Models, Multimodal, and Speech AI (Automatic Speech Recognition and Text-to-Speech)

models.name: ras-commander
models.description: The RAS-Commander library provides a python API for automating HEC-RAS 6.x and accessing HDF data using Python, built with and driven by large language models.

models.name: prompt-siren
models.description: A research workbench for developing and testing attacks against large language models, with a focus on prompt injection vulnerabilities and defenses.

models.name: rl-injector
models.description: Official release of code for the paper RL is a hammer and LLMs are nails A simple RL approach to stronger prompt injection attacks

models.name: NewsPilot
models.description: NewsPilot is an automated intelligence analysis system based on Large Language Models (LLM), designed to transform massive global news into personalized, actionable insights. It is not just a news aggregation tool, but a 24/7 intelligent intelligence assistant that understands your profession, holdings, and interests.

models.name: Forgetting-A-New-Mechanism-Towards-Better-Large-Language-Model-Fine-tuning
models.description: [TMLR 2026 J2C Certification] FORGETTING: A New Mechanism Towards Better Large Language Model Fine-Tuning

models.name: mcp-github-pr-issue-analyser
models.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) application for automated GitHub PR analysis and issue management. Enables LLMs to fetch PR details, analyse diffs, manage issues, and handle releases through a standardised interface

models.name: AI-ML-ENGINEERING-JOURNEY
models.description: A structured end-to-end AI/ML engineering journey covering mathematics, machine learning, deep learning, large language models, MLOps, and production-grade projects. Built with a strong focus on fundamentals, implementation, and real-world systems.

models.name: agentdeck-preview
models.description: AgentDeck is a research platform for studying AI behavior through game scenarios. Run controlled experiments with LLMs, collect comprehensive behavioral data, and replay matches for analysis. 🚧 Preview release - feedback welcome.

models.name: Auto-Pentest-LLM
models.description: 🔍 Automate penetration testing with an intelligent agent that organizes security assessments, leveraging local LLMs and Kali Linux for effective exploitation.

models.name: AI-Drug-Repurposing
models.description: An end-to-end AI drug repurposing system based on knowledge graphs + large language models. Supported by CrewAI multi-agent collaboration, it quickly and efficiently identifies new indications for existing drugs.

models.name: Informer-LLM
models.description: Code for our Informer-LLM paper on time series forecasting with Informer and large language models.

models.name: Source-Code-Security-Audit-Reviewer
models.description: intelligent auditing tool powered by large language models, supporting GPT, . It automatically detects security vulnerabilities, performance issues

models.name: unlearn-plm
models.description: This repository teaches you, how you can train a pre-trained language model with large scale data and make it unlearn to prevent model hallucinating. Here, we used a set of methods like gradient ascent, descent with KL divergence to prevent regularization.

models.name: Alpha-Omega-Plus
models.description: Verify large language model reasoning with a meta-layer for stability, coherence, and hallucination detection using tetralectic logic and scoring

models.name: ai-agent-pulse
models.description: Daily automated tracking of 19 AI agent frameworks. Pulse Score ranks momentum via star velocity, release freshness, commit activity, and community health.

models.name: delegate52
models.description: Code  that accompanies the paper release for "LLMs Corrupt Your Documents When You Delegate"

models.name: GitLog
models.description: AI-powered changelog and release notes generator for developers and teams

models.name: Recipe-Language-Model
models.description: Recipe Language Model (RLM): We introduce a domain-specific RLM developed through seven AI layers and interconnected robotic boxes to drive the evolution of physical AI for defining a new paradigm - Materials Intelligence.

models.name: langchain_models
models.description: A repository for building and testing AI applications using LangChain and large language models.

models.name: AI-CQ-Pipeline
models.description: DevOps - Software Quality Analysis and Repair Using Large Language Models

models.name: github_projcets_DA
models.description: Development of a Business Intelligence (BI) Dashboard integrated with LLMs (Large Language Models) for predictive and descriptive analysis of corporate datasets via simplified Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)

models.name: gMART
models.description: gMART is a tiny geospatial Multi-Agent Restrictions Test repository created in order to test Large Language Models capabilities to extract geospatial construction restrictions from user prompt within pre-defined geospatial tools.

models.name: Accumulative-Decoding
models.description: Reduce hallucinations in large vision-language models with training-free accumulative decoding for more accurate outputs

models.name: TrustLayer
models.description: A Multi-Source Framework for Hallucination Detection and Reliability Scoring in Large Language Model Outputs

models.name: OPSD
models.description: Train large language models with on-policy self-distillation for token-level reasoning and better performance

models.name: multilingual-railway-llm-edu
models.description: Multilingual Railway LLM for International Vocational Education: A knowledge-enhanced large language model fine-tuned for railway engineering, supporting Chinese/English/Malay cross-lingual Q&A, professional tutoring, and intelligent applications in overseas railway vocational education and study-abroad training.

models.name: zettelvault
models.description: Organize Obsidian vaults into clean PARA and Zettelkasten structures using large language models for efficient knowledge management.

models.name: aegisRT
models.description: Provide a Python-native framework to test and audit security in large language models with coverage of key OWASP LLM risks.

models.name: auto-crawl-tiktok-post-fb
models.description: Automate TikTok to Facebook posting, schedule Reels, and manage AI replies, inbox, campaigns, and workers in one dashboard

models.name: auto-hf-papers
models.description: Automate Hugging Face Daily Papers filtering and email a daily Markdown digest of the most relevant AI papers by upvotes and GitHub stars

models.name: llm-seclint
models.description: Scan Python code for LLM security flaws before release.

models.name: vgt-auto-punisher
models.description: Detect and block network threats in Linux kernels using hybrid L4 and L7 behavioral analysis for effective intrusion prevention and response.

models.name: OnePersonCompany
models.description: Transform daily progress into structured reports, release notes, and shareable content to simplify solo or small team project management.

models.name: HowHungryisAIRepo
models.description: This repository powers the “How Hungry is AI?” dashboard and provides the code + data release accompanying our paper on inference-phase (operational) environmental footprints of LLMs.

models.name: daily-brief
models.description: An automated personal daily briefing agent that crawls tech news sources, summarizes the top stories using a free LLM, generates an audio MP3, commits a Markdown brief to a GitHub repo, uploads the MP3 as a GitHub Release asset, and deploys a GitHub Pages web archive

models.name: qa-cicd-framework
models.description: Enterprise QA framework + CI/CD pipeline for SciFin's AI platform (distributed systems, concurrency, LLM orchestration). Includes code tests, feature tests, UI/UX, LLM evals, and automated release gates

models.name: language-neutral-or-language-specific
models.description: Paper-complete release for multilingual LLM shared-vs-specific naturalistic fMRI analyses in LPPC.

models.name: daily-tech
models.description: Daily tech intelligence report — fetches GitHub trends & releases, summarizes with LLM, generates a styled HTML dashboard

models.name: gutenberg-corpus-cli
models.description: Interactive Python CLI to browse Project Gutenberg and build public-domain book corpora for NLP / LLM training. Browse Top 100, Most Popular (30d), daily New Releases, paginated categories with counts, full metadata with plot summaries. Parallel downloads in EPUB/TXT/HTML/Kindle formats, local SQLite catalog, full-text search.

models.name: QuantileMark
models.description: This is the official code release for the paper:  "QuantileMark: A Message-Symmetric Multi-bit Watermark for LLMs"

models.name: Fake-News-Detection
models.description: Real-Time Fake News Detection offers an API-first approach to content moderation and journalistic verification. Powered by advanced Natural Language Processing (NLP) and ensemble tree models, this platform analyzes structure, sentiment, and context to deliver actionable credibility metrics.

models.name: AI-News-Newsletter-Assistant
models.description: Aggregate and summarize AI news from RSS feeds using multithreading and large language models, delivering formatted newsletters to your email automatically.

models.name: memfuse
models.description: MemFuse offers a robust memory layer for large language models, enhancing their performance and efficiency. Join our community on GitHub to explore features, report issues, or request new functionalities! 🐙💻

models.name: news-analytics-nlp
models.description: Information Extraction with Small Language Model and Data Analytics

models.name: FakeNewsDetector
models.description: Machine learning project for fake news detection in English-language news articles using TF-IDF and scikit-learn models.

models.name: The-Chakma-Project
models.description: The East Bengal language of Chakma is classified as endangered, and due to a lack of linguistic resources, current machine translation performs poorly for this language. The aim of this project is to improve machine translation by the creation of a new dataset and training of a translation model to improve the current large language model APIs.

models.name: Fake-News-Detector-Using-NLP-And-ML
models.description: Fake News Detector is a machine learning–based web application that identifies whether a news article is real or fake using Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques. The project analyzes textual data, extracts meaningful features, and applies trained ML models to make accurate predictions.

models.name: ShakespeareLLM
models.description: A local language model designed by me using a neural network and transformers, trained on all of the works of Shakespeare to make new, fake Shakespeare wish me luck

models.name: fake-news-detector
models.description: Fake News Detection using Machine Learning – A system that analyzes news articles and classifies them as real or fake using natural language processing (NLP) and machine learning models.

models.name: Fake-News-Detector
models.description: Advanced Fake News Detection System built with Machine Learning. Implements ensemble modeling (Passive Aggressive, Logistic Regression, Random Forest) with TF-IDF vectorization. Features include real-time multi-language support (Hindi/English), data visualization (WordCloud/EDA), and a user-friendly Streamlit dashboard.

models.name: Udacity-PriceScout---The-AI-Powered-Competitor-Analyst
models.description: For this project, you're a Senior Strategy Analyst at a new, fast-growing AI company. Your company builds infrastructure for developers to run large language models, and you're in a market with tons of competition. Everyone is changing their prices, adding new models, and updating features every week.

models.name: mini_LLM_project
models.description: A mini GPT-style language model built from scratch using PyTorch, featuring a custom Transformer architecture with multi-head self-attention. It trains on a small text corpus and generates new text by predicting the next token, using SentencePiece BPE tokenization.

models.name: Real-And-Fake-New-Detection
models.description: A Natural Language Processing (NLP) based project that classifies news articles as Fake or Real using machine learning models like Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and SVM. The system uses TF-IDF for feature extraction and achieves high performance with an accuracy of 98.66% and F1-score of 98.60%.

models.name: fake_news_detection_from_user_dataset
models.description: This project aims to detect fake news using Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Machine Learning techniques. It processes a dataset of news articles, cleans and vectorizes the text using TF-IDF, and classifies them as FAKE or REAL using a Logistic Regression model.

models.name: News-Driven-Risk-Analytics-Dashboard
models.description: A real-time financial news analytics system that combines Natural Language Processing (NLP) and data visualization to assess how media sentiment impacts market risk. The project automates an end-to-end data pipeline  mirroring workflows used in risk management and traded-risk model monitoring

models.name: Nova-ai-bot-new-
models.description: Nova is highly professional ai language model
